Package org.bonitasoft.engine.xml

Class XStreamDenyList

java.lang.Object
org.bonitasoft.engine.xml.XStreamDenyList
public final class XStreamDenyList extends Object
Configurable XStream deserialization deny list.

Provides the list of wildcard patterns used by XStream.denyTypesByWildcard() to block known deserialization gadget chain libraries and prevent RCE.

The deny list can be overridden at runtime via the system property "bonita.xstream.deny.packages" (comma-separated wildcard patterns). When set, it fully replaces the hardcoded defaults.

Important: The system property is read at first XStream usage. It should be set at JVM startup (e.g. via -D flag) before any serialization/deserialization occurs.

      public static String[] getDenyPatterns()
